data.name: NKS_SSH_COMMAND_SSHELL_DESC
data.value: ek ssh sarvar se judata hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_PASSWORDPROMPT
data.value: {0} ke lie paasavard darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SSH_DISCONNECTED
data.value: ssh diskanekt kiya gaya.

data.name: NKS_SSH_CONNECTFAILED
data.value: ssh sarvar se kanekt karane ka prayaas karane mein truti: {0}

data.name: NKS_SSH_INVALIDOPTION
data.value: nirdisht vikalp {0} amaany hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_ANSWERNEEDSNUM
data.value: uttar sankhyaatmak hona chaahie.

data.name: NKS_SSH_GOBACK
data.value: vaapas jaane ke lie koee bhee kunjee dabaen.

data.name: NKS_SSH_COMMAND_SSHCMD_DESC
data.value: ek kamaand nishpaadit karane ke lie ek ssh sarvar se judata hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_AUTHMETHOD_QUESTION
data.value: aap kaise pramaanit karana chaahate hain?

data.name: NKS_SSH_AUTHMETHOD_PRIVATEKEY
data.value: nijee kunjee fail

data.name: NKS_SSH_AUTHMETHOD_PASSWORD
data.value: kunjika

data.name: NKS_SSH_PASSPHRASEPROMPT
data.value: kunjee {0} ke lie paasafrez darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SSH_KEYFILENOTFOUND
data.value: kunjee fail {0} maujood nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_CANTADDPRIVKEY
data.value: nijee kunjee jodane ka prayaas karane mein truti:

data.name: NKS_SSH_SSHCMDFAILED
data.value: ssh kamaand nishpaadit karane mein truti

data.name: NKS_SSH_SSHELLFAILED
data.value: ssh shel mein truti

data.name: NKS_SSH_SETTINGS_LOGINPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apane login prompt ko kaise chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_PRIVKEYLOCATIONPROMPT
data.value: {0} ke lie nijee kunjee ka sthaan darj karen. kunjiyaan jodane ka kaam poora karane ke lie "q" likhen:

data.name: NKS_SSH_SETTINGS_DESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako yah konfigar karane deta hai ki ssh kaise kaam karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_SETTINGS_LOGINPROMPT_NAME
data.value: ssh ke lie upayogakarta naam prompt shailee

data.name: NKS_SSH_SETTINGS_SPEEDDIAL_NAME
data.value: ssh speed daayal mein nae kanekshan joden

data.name: NKS_SSH_SETTINGS_SPEEDDIAL_DESC
data.value: yadi saksham hai, to ssh speed daayal mein ek naya kanekshan jodata hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SSH_EXCEPTION_CONNECTEDNOCLIENT
data.value: ssh kanekt hai lekin klaint nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_SSH_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_ADDRESS_DESC
data.value: kanekt karane ke lie ssh sarvar

data.name: NKS_SSH_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_USERNAME_DESC
data.value: pramaanit karane ke lie upayogakarta naam

data.name: NKS_SSH_COMMAND_SSHCMD_ARGUMENT_COMMAND_DESC
data.value: doorasth roop se nishpaadit karane ke lie kamaand
